All 'and'-joined titles resolve to one coherent concern: T-001's 'parity lock' is verification work for its own registry (rule 1); T-002's 'effort-resolution priority' is elaboration of 'selector v2 support' (same feature) and 'ADR-0012' is mandatory same-commit housekeeping per design.md's explicit Drafting-ownership assignment (rule 2); T-003's three clauses are facets of one renderer script; T-005's 'close the test.yml registration gap' is mandatory CI-wiring housekeeping inseparable from the test authoring it registers (rule 2); T-006's 'reject argv injection' is the same argv-construction code path as 'apply effort' per requirements.md REQ-006's own single-paragraph bundling (not a distinct feature concern).

No 'ensure'/'consider'/'works correctly' found in any Done-When list (grep across tasks.md).
